title: FrootAI Agent Schema
description: Validates YAML frontmatter for .agent.md files — the AI persona definition format for FrootAI standalone and play-wired agents.

description.description: Purpose statement for this agent (1-2 sentences). Must clearly state the agent's expertise and role.

name.description: Human-readable display name for the agent.

model.description: Preferred LLM model identifier (e.g., GPT-4.1, GPT-4o, claude-sonnet-4). Optional — defaults to provider default.

tools.description: List of tool identifiers this agent can invoke. Tools may include MCP servers, VS Code commands, or built-in capabilities.

waf.description: WAF pillars this agent enforces or aligns with. Unique to FrootAI — no competitor has architecture-aligned agents.

plays.description: Solution play IDs this agent is designed for (e.g., '01', '01-enterprise-rag'). When used inside a play, the agent auto-wires with shared context.
